div/zero divisor yields Infinity.reason: bf.Div degrades to 0 so a template render survives instead of emitting +Inf

number/empty string coerces to 0.reason: deliberate: empty input must not silently zero downstream arithmetic

number/null coerces to 0.reason: deliberate: unset props must not silently zero downstream arithmetic

string/null renders as the string \"null.reason: deliberate: an unset prop must not surface a literal "null" in HTML

sort/localeCompare orders case-insensiti.reason: strings.Compare is byte order, not ICU collation

sort/relational compare on numeric strin.reason: the "auto" compare goes numeric when both keys parse as numbers

reduce/numeric-string items concatenate.reason: numeric folds parse numeric strings (toFloat64WithOK) instead of concatenating

search_params_get/absent key is null.reason: url.Values.Get returns "" for an absent key where JS URLSearchParams.get returns null; the ?? → or lowering folds both to the author default, so SSR output still matches
